hero.title: Simplifying complex challenges to build
hero.subtitle: Helping startups and brands craft high-performance web applications, mobile apps, and robust backend architectures.

line2.pre: Expertise extends to modern systems like

specializedCouncil.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
specializedCouncil.description:
Developed and delivered two production platforms that digitize the management of youth organizations and clubs across Saudi Arabia.

Key projects:
• Associations Map – Built an interactive map platform where organizations can register, manage their profiles, and appear on a dynamic map after administrative approval.
• Nadi Platform – Developed a centralized platform for managing youth clubs, enabling organizations to create and manage clubs while providing administrators with a complete management dashboard. The platform currently manages 300+ active clubs.

Responsibilities:
• Designed and developed the frontend and backend from the ground up using Next.js and NestJS.
• Integrated Google Maps to provide interactive geographic experiences across both platforms.
• Managed production infrastructure using Dokploy, VPS hosting, GitHub Actions, and CI/CD pipelines.
• Owned deployment, monitoring, maintenance, bug fixes, and ongoing feature enhancements after project delivery.

gtkTechPartTime.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
gtkTechPartTime.description:
Working remotely as a Full-Stack Software Engineer while continuing my university studies, collaborating with distributed teams to build and maintain production applications.

Key projects:
• Developed a B2B booking platform using Laravel, providing businesses with an end-to-end reservation management system.
• Built a digital wallet platform consisting of:
  - Admin dashboard built with Next.js
  - Cross-platform mobile application built with React Native (Expo)
  - Backend APIs built with Hono
  - Monorepo architecture for web, mobile, and backend services.

Responsibilities:
• Implemented new features across web, mobile, and backend applications.
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams in a remote environment.
• Contributed throughout the development lifecycle, from implementation to production support.

gtkTechContract.title: Full-Stack Developer
gtkTechContract.description:
Delivered multiple client projects across web platforms and business management systems, contributing to frontend, backend, API development, and UI redesign initiatives.

Key projects:
• Automotive Spare Parts Platform – Developed the frontend using Laravel, and later contributed to backend maintenance and feature development alongside the engineering team.
• Pool Management System – Designed and developed the complete web platform and REST APIs using Laravel; built administrative tools for managing pool owners, reservations, and daily operations; and developed APIs consumed by the companion mobile application.
• Security Systems Company Website – Redesigned the company's website to align with its new brand identity and design system, and implemented additional backend features for the administration dashboard.

freelance.title: Frontend Developer
freelance.description:
Delivered frontend development services for multiple projects, building responsive interfaces using React.js and modern styling tools.

Key projects:
• Built reusable UI components and page layouts aligned with client brand guides.
• Implemented client-side routing, state management, and optimized API data fetching.
